verses.text: Josiah in uk ding a kipatin kum giat pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthumlekhat sung uk hi
Topa' mitah a man gamta a, a pu David' khekhap zui-in themkhat zong lampial lo hi.

Ama uk a kum giatna sung, naupang ahi laipi mahin, amah in a pu David' Pasian zon' ding kipan hi. A kum sawmlenihna ciangin amah in Judah leh Jerusalem panin mual dawna biaknate, Asherah milimte, leh a kiseek leh a kisung milimte beisiangsak ding kipan hi

Tua ciangin amah in Baal-te' biakna taute ama muhna-ah supaisak hi. Tua ciangin amah in tuate tungah a om paknamtui biakna taute phuk a, Asherah milimte, leh a kiseek leh a kisung milimte sukhamin gawivui a, tuate' tungah biakna a pia mite' han tungah tua a vuite a theh hi
Amah in amau' biakna taute tungah a siampite' guhte zong hal a, Judah leh Jerusalem a siangsak hi
Tua ciangin Manasseh, Efraim, leh Simeon, leh Naftali khuapi ciangdong, mun awngte leh a kiim a pamah
amah in biakna taute sukhamin Asherah milimte leh milim dangte satvui a, Israel gamsung khempeuhah paknamtui biakna taute a satvui hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah a ciahkik hi.

Tu-in ama uk a kum sawmlegiatna, gamsung leh biakinn a sian'sak khit ciangin, Topa a Pasian' biakinn a puah dingin amah in Azariah' tapa Shafan, leh khuapi sung ukpa Maaseiah, leh thu ciamtehpa ahi, Joahaz' tapa Joah a sawl hi

Siampi lianpenpa Hilkiah kiangah amaute hong pai uh a, kongcingte ahi Levi mite in Manasseh leh Efraim, leh Israel a omlaite khempeuh, leh Judah leh Benjamin khempeuh, leh Jerusalem-a a teng mite tung panin a khop uh ahi, Pasian' biakinn-ah a hong kipaipih sumte a pia uh hi
Amaute in Topa' biakinn a vaan nasemte tungah tua sumte pia uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa' biakinn-ah a sem nasemte in biakinn puahna ding leh a ngei batsak kikna dingin pia uh hi
Amaute in a kito suangte leina ding, leh Judah kumpite in a siatsak, tepna dingin singte leh biakinn lamna dingin innkamte leina dingin khutsiamte leh innlamte tungah a sumte a pia uh hi

Tua ciangin mite in cihtakna tawh na sem uh hi. Amaute tungah a en dingin Levi mi Merari-te beh sung pan Jahath leh Obadiah, leh Kohath-te beh sung pan Zekhariah leh Meshullam kikoih hi. Levi mi, lasakna nazatte-ah siamna a nei khempeuh
vangik puate a uk, leh nasep namkim a sem khempeuh a makaih uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mi pawlkhatte pen laigelhte, leh za neite, leh kulhkongpi cingte ahi hi
Amaute in Topa' biakinn-ah a kipaipih sumte a lakkhiat laitakun siampi Hilkiah in Moses tung tawnin a kipia thukham laibu a mu hi
Tua ciangin Hilkiah in lai-atpa Shafan kiangah, “ Topa' biakinn sungah thukham laibu ka mu hi,” ci hi. Tua ciangin Hilkiah in Shafan tungah a laibu pia hi
Shafan in kumpipa kiangah a laibu paipihin ama kiangah, “Na nasemte tungah a kipia khempeuh amaute in a sep san laitak uh ahi hi
Topa' biakinn sungah a kikoih sumte amaute in lakhia-in nasep vaante leh nasemte tungah pia uh hi,” ci-in gen thuah lai hi
Tua ciangin lai-atpa Shafan in kumpipa kiangah, “Siampi Hilkiah in kei tungah laibu khat hong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Shafan in kumpipa mai-ah tua laibu a sim hi
Kumpipa in thukham kammalte a zak ciangin a puante balkek hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in Hilkiah, Shafan' tapa Ahikam, Mikah' tapa Abdon, lai-atpa Shafan, leh kumpipa' nasempa Asaiah thu pia-in

“Pai un la, a kimu laibu sunga kammalte tawh kisai-in keima-a' ding leh Israel leh Judah-ah a omlai mite-a' dingin Topa thu va dong un; bang hang hiam cih leh i pu i pate in hih laibu sungah a kigelh khempeuh bangin sep ding Topa' kammal na zuilo uh ahih manin eite tungah Topa' hehna lian hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Hilkiah leh kumpipa in a sawl mite, Hasrah, a tapa Tokhath, a tapa Shallum, biakinn puante a kempa' zi ahi kamsangnu Huldah kiangah pai-in (tu-in tuanu Jerusalem sung a Veng Nihna-ah teng hi) tua thu tawh kisai ama kiangah va gen uh hi
Tua ciangin tuanu in amaute kiangah, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Kei kiangah note a hong sawlpa kiangah gen un
Topa in hih bangin ci hi: En un, Judah kumpipa mai-ah a kisim laibu sunga kigelh samsiatnate khempeuh ahi siatna, hih mun leh a tungah a teng mi khempeuh tungah ka tungsak ding hi
Amaute in amau' gamtatna tawh kei hong hehsak theihna dingun amaute in kei hong nusia-in pasian dangte tungah paknamtui hal uh ahih manin hih mun tungah ka hehna kisungin dailo ding hi
Ahih hangin Topa thu a dong dingin note a hong sawl Judah kumpipa tungah hih bangin na gen ding uh hi. Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Na zaksa thute tawh kisai-in

hih mun leh a tunga tengte langpan'na ama kammal na zak ciangin na lungsim kisikin Pasian' mai-ah na kiniamkhiat a, keima mai-ah nang kiniamkhiatin na puante balkekin ka mai-ah kap na hih manin, kei zong nang kong za hi, Topa in ci hi

Na pate kiang kong zuansak ding a, hih mun leh a tunga tengte tungah ka tun'sak ding siatna khempeuh na mit in mulo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in kumpipa kiangah a thu puakkik uh hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in mi sawlin Judah leh Jerusalem upa khempeuh kaikhawm hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa, Judah mite leh Jerusalem-a a teng mite, siampite leh Levi mite, leh mi khempeuh a lian a neu tawh, Topa' biakinn-ah paito uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in Topa' biakinn sungah a kimu thuciamna laibu sunga thute khempeuh amau' zakin a sim hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa ama munah dingin, hih laibu sungah a kigelh thuciamna kammalte a sem dingin a lungsim khempeuh leh a nuntakna khempeuh tawh Topa' nung a zuihna ding leh ama thupiaknate, ama tecipan'nate, leh a thukhamte a zuihna ding, Topa' mai-ah thuciamna khat a bawl hi
Tua ciangin amah in Jerusalem leh Benjamin sunga a om mi khempeuh hih thu a zuisak hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem-a teng mite zong amau' pute pate' Pasian ahi Pasian' thuciamna bangin a gamta uh hi

Tua ciangin Josiah in Israel mite' neihsa gamsung khempeuh panin a kihhuaite khempeuh lakhia a, Israel sunga om mi khempeuh Topa amaute' Pasian' na a semsak hi. Ama nuntak sung khempeuh amau' pute pate' Pasian ahi Topa zuihna panin amaute kiheikhia lo uh hi.
